scripts.check: pnpm run fmt:check && pnpm run lint
scripts.fmt: node ../../scripts/run-vite-ox-tool.mjs fmt consumer.ts utils vite.config.ts tsconfig.json package.json README.md
scripts.fmt:check: node ../../scripts/run-vite-ox-tool.mjs fmt --check consumer.ts utils vite.config.ts tsconfig.json package.json README.md
scripts.benchmark:batch: BENCHMARK_ONLY=v3-batch,v4-batch,kafkajs BENCHMARK_ITERATIONS=100000 BENCHMARK_RUNS=5 node --expose-gc --import tsx consumer.ts
scripts.benchmark:batch:quick: BENCHMARK_ONLY=v3-batch,v4-batch,kafkajs BENCHMARK_ITERATIONS=100000 BENCHMARK_RUNS=3 node --expose-gc --import tsx consumer.ts
